revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿四]][[zh:七月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿四]][[zh:七月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿四]][[zh:七月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿四]][[zh:七月廿四]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 24|qq=July 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} . == Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|en|Empress Kōgyoku|qid=Q235296|lt=Emperor Saimei|1=Empress Kōgyoku}} 7th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|661|en|661|qid=Q30084|lt=661 AD|1=661}} {{ill|August 24|en|August 24|qid=Q2825|lt=August 24|1=August 24}} ) – Following the passing ({{ill|Demise of the Crown|en|Demise of the Crown|qid=Q842994|lt=Passing|1=Demise of the Crown}} ) of Emperor Saimei, {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|qid=Q314802|lt=Prince Naka-Ōe|1=Emperor Tenji}} assumed the regency as {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} . * {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|qid=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era|1=Ōan}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Kentoku|en|Kentoku|qid=Q1143922|lt=Kentoku|1=Kentoku}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1370|en|1370|qid=Q6217|lt=1370 AD|1=1370}} {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}} ) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court (Japan)|1=Southern Dynasties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1206988}} enacted an era change from {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei (Japan)|1=Zhengping}} to Kentoku. * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1758|en|1758|qid=Q7639|lt=1758 AD|1=1758}} {{ill|August 27|en|August 27|qid=Q2822|lt=August 27|1=August 27}} ) – The {{ill|Hōrei Incident|ja|Hōreki事件|1=Q11452563|2=ja|3=宝暦事件|qid=Q11452563|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōrei Incident|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11452563}} occurred when the Shinto scholar {{ill|Takeuchi Tadamochi|ja|竹内敬持|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeuchi Tadamochi|1=Takenouchi Shikibu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q644313}} was arrested for teaching {{ill|Sonnō ideology|ja|尊皇思想|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonnō ideology|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尊王論|1=sonnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11458667}} to the court nobility ({{ill|Kuge|en|Kuge|qid=Q1196276|lt=Kuge|1=Kuge}} ).
== Births == * {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enchō|1=Enchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97379316}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|923|en|923|qid=Q30108|lt=923 AD|1=923}} {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Suzaku|en|Emperor Suzaku|qid=Q361019|lt=Emperor Suzaku|1=Emperor Suzaku}} , the 61st {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} (d. {{ill|952|en|952|qid=Q30175|lt=952 AD|1=952}} ). * [[Ōei]]{{efn|July 1394 through April 1428|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 14th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1407|en|1407|qid=Q6134|lt=1407 AD|1=1407}} {{ill|August 27|en|August 27|qid=Q2822|lt=August 27|1=August 27}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshikazu|en|Ashikaga Yoshikazu|qid=Q465901|lt=Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|1=Ashikaga Yoshikazu}} , the 5th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} (d. {{ill|1425|en|1425|qid=Q6283|lt=1425 AD|1=1425}} ).
== Deaths == * In the 7th Year of {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|en|Empress Kōgyoku|qid=Q235296|lt=Emperor Saimei|1=Empress Kōgyoku}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|661|en|661|qid=Q30084|lt=661 AD|1=661}} {{ill|August 24|en|August 24|qid=Q2825|lt=August 24|1=August 24}} ) – {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|en|Empress Kōgyoku|qid=Q235296|lt=Kōgoku Tennō|1=Empress Kōgyoku}} , counted as the 35th/37th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|594|en|594|qid=Q33625|lt=594 AD|1=594}} ). * In the 3rd Year of {{ill|Tenchō|en|Tenchō|qid=Q1373138|lt=Tenchō|1=Tenchō}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|826|en|826|qid=Q30376|lt=826 AD|1=826}} {{ill|August 30|en|August 30|qid=Q2818|lt=August 30|1=August 30}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Fuyutsugu|en|Fujiwara no Fuyutsugu|qid=Q3090616|lt=Fujiwara Fuyutsugu|1=Fujiwara no Fuyutsugu}} , a court noble ({{ill|Court noble|ja|Kugyō|1=Kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Court noble|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3138036}} ), poet ({{ill|Poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Poet|1=Waka poet|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11122954}} ), and Minister of State ({{ill|Minister of State|ja|Daijō-daijin|1=Daijō-daijin|2=ja|3=太政大臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of State|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1157586}} ) (born {{ill|775|en|775|qid=Q30075|lt=775 AD|1=775}} ). * In the 7th Year of {{ill|Kankō|en|Kankō|qid=Q2736722|lt=Kanpō|1=Kankō}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1010|en|1010|qid=Q19237|lt=1010 AD|1=1010}} {{ill|September 5|en|September 5|qid=Q2854|lt=September 5|1=September 5}} ) – {{ill|Ōe Igen|ja|大江以言|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōe Igen|1=Ōe no Mochitoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11436798}} , a literary figure of the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|qid=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}} (born {{ill|955|en|955|qid=Q23579|lt=955 AD|1=955}} ). * In the 1st Year of {{ill|Kōan (Kamakura period)|en|Kōan (Kamakura period)|qid=Q389180|lt=Kōan|1=Kōan (Kamakura period)}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1278|en|1278|qid=Q5533|lt=1278 AD|1=1278}} {{ill|August 13|en|August 13|qid=Q2776|lt=August 13|1=August 13}} ) – {{ill|Lanxi Daolong|en|Lanxi Daolong|qid=Q357988|lt=Rankei Dōryū|1=Lanxi Daolong}} , a monk ({{ill|Monk|en|Monk|qid=Q733786|lt=Monk|1=Monk}} ) (born {{ill|1213|en|1213|qid=Q5261|lt=1213 AD|1=1213}} ). * In the 1st Year of {{ill|Jōji|en|Jōji|qid=Q1146153|lt=Teiji|1=Jōji}} / the 17th Year of {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei (Japan)|1=Zhengping}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1362|en|1362|qid=Q6166|lt=1362 AD|1=1362}} {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}} ) – {{ill|Hosokawa Kiyoshige|ja|細川清氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Kiyoshige|1=Hosokawa Kiyouji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11605934}} , an administrator of the {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} (birth year unknown). * In the 14th Year of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1586|en|1586|qid=Q6739|lt=1586 AD|1=1586}} {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}} ) – [[:en:Prince Masahito|Prince Makoto Hito]] , the first imperial prince of {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|en|Emperor Ōgimachi|qid=Q334076|lt=Emperor Shōchō|1=Emperor Ōgimachi}} (born {{ill|1552|en|1552|qid=Q6565|lt=1552 AD|1=1552}} ). * In the 13th Year of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1842|en|1842|qid=Q7625|lt=1842 AD|1=1842}} {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}} ) – {{ill|Yabe Sadakane|ja|矢部定謙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yabe Sadakane|1=Yabe Sadanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11584288}} , the Edo Nanchō Magistrate (born {{ill|1789|en|1789|qid=Q7772|lt=1789 AD|1=1789}} ).
== Fictional Events == === Births === * In the 4th Year of {{ill|Chōroku|en|Chōroku|qid=Q1193524|lt=Chōroku|1=Chōroku}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1460|en|1460|qid=Q6528|lt=1460 AD|1=1460}} {{ill|August 10|en|August 10|qid=Q2779|lt=August 10|1=August 10}} ) – {{ill|Inuzuka Nobuyoshi|ja|犬塚信乃|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inuzuka Nobuyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a character appearing in the reading book {{ill|Nansō Satomi Hakkenden|en|Nansō Satomi Hakkenden|qid=Q557852|lt=Nansō Satomi Hakkenden|1=Nansō Satomi Hakkenden}} .
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|23|7|25|6|24|8|7|0724|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 7월 24일]] [[ja:7月24日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:七月廿四]]
[[ja:年表]]
[[ar:July 24 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月廿四]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月廿四]] {{wikidata link|Q839874}} [[Category:Days 24 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
